| RX18                                                            | Days Supply  Estimated number of days the medication will cover                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | - Original Fill  **File**  : PRESCRIPTION (#52)  **Field**  : DAYS SUPPLY (#8)  - Refill  **Sub-File**  : REFILL (#52.1)  **Field**  : DAYS SUPPLY (#1.1)  - Partial  **Sub-File**  : PARTIAL (#52.2)  **Field**  : QTY (#.041)  Example: 90                                                                |
| RX19                                                            | Not Used                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| RX20                                                            | Number Of Refills Authorized  Number of refills authorized by the prescriber                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | **File**  : PRESCRIPTION (#52)  **Field**  : # OF REFILLS (#9)  Example: 5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| RX21-RX29                                                       | Not Used                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| PRE – Prescriber Information                                    | PRE – Prescriber Information                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | PRE – Prescriber Information                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| PRE01                                                           | National Provider Identifier (NPI)  Identifier assigned to the prescriber by CMS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | ASAP 3.0 : Not Used ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber National Provider Identifier (NPI)  Retrieved via the Registration API $$NPI^XUSNPI (ICR # 4532) using the prescription fill provider  **Example**  : 1043278211                                                                                                  |
| PRE02                                                           | DEA Number  Identifying number assigned to a prescriber or an institution by the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | ASAP 3.0 : Not Used ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber DEA Number  First “-“ (dash) piece of the value returned by the Registration API $$DEA^XUSER (ICR # 2343) using the prescription fill provider  **Example**  : AV4598251                                                                                          |
| PRE03                                                           | DEA Number Suffix  Identifying number assigned to a prescriber by an institution when the institution’s number is used as the DEA number, if required by the PMP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | ASAP 3.0 : Prescriber NPI ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber DEA Number Suffix  Second “-“ (dash) piece of the value returned by the Registration API $$DEA^XUSER (ICR # 2343) using the prescription fill provider  **Example**  : 4598251PP                                                                            |
| PRE04                                                           | Prescriber State License Number  Identification assigned to the Prescriber by the State Licensing Board  Used if required by the PMP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | ASAP 3.0 : Prescriber DEA Number ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber State License Number (Not Used)                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| PRE05                                                           | Last Name  Prescriber’s last name  Used if required by the PMP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | ASAP 3.0 : Prescriber DEA Number Suffix ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber Last Name  **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value before the comma (e.g.,  **SMITH**  , JOHN F)  **Example**  : SMITH                                                                                           |
| PRE06                                                           | First Name  Prescriber’s first name  Used if required by the PMP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | ASAP 3.0 : Prescriber State License Number (Not Used) ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber First Name  **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value after the comma and before blank space (e.g., SMITH,  **JOHN**  F)  Example: JOHN                                                              |
| PRE07                                                           | Middle Name  Prescriber’s middle name or initial  Used if required by the PMP and is available in the pharmacy system                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | ASAP 3.0 : Prescriber Alternate ID (Not Used) ASAP 4.0+: Prescriber Middle Name  **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value after the comma and after the first blank space (e.g., SMITH, JOHN  **F**  )  Example: F                                                              |
| PRE08                                                           | Phone Number  Prescriber’s phone number                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | ASAP 3.0 : Prescriber's Last Name ASAP 4.0 &amp; 4.1: N/A (up to PRE07 only) ASAP 4.2: Prescriber's Phone Number  **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : PHONE NUMBER # (#.132)  **Example**  : 5559998888 (no dashes)                                                                                 |
| PRE09                                                           | Prescriber' First Name  Prescriber’s first name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | ASAP 3.0 Only  **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value after the comma and before blank space (e.g., SMITH,  **JOHN**  F)  Example: JOHN                                                                                                                                       |
| PRE10                                                           | Prescriber' Middle Name  Prescriber’s middle name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | ASAP 3.0 Only  **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value after the comma and after the first blank space (e.g., SMITH, JOHN  **F**  )  Example: F                                                                                                                                |
| PRE11-PRE20                                                     | Not Used                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| RPH – Pharmacist Information (ASAP 3.0 only)                    | RPH – Pharmacist Information (ASAP 3.0 only)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | RPH – Pharmacist Information (ASAP 3.0 only)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| RPH01-RPH02                                                     | Not Used                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| RPH03                                                           | National Provider Identification (NPI)  Identifier assigned to the pharmacist by CMS if the pharmacist applies for a number. This number is used to identify the pharmacist who dispensed the medication.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Retrieved via the Registration API $$NPI^XUSNPI (ICR # 4532) using the prescription fill pharmacist.  **Example**  : 1043278211                                                                                                                                                                             |

| RPH07                                                           | First Name  Pharmacist’s first name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value after the comma and before blank space (e.g., SMITH,  **JOHN**  F)  Example: JOHN                                                                                                                                                      |
| RPH08                                                           | Middle Name  Pharmacist’s middle name or initial                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | **File**  : NEW PERSON (#200)  **Field**  : NAME (#.01)  First value after the comma and after the first blank space (e.g., SMITH, JOHN  **F**  )  Example: F                                                                                                                                               |
| RPH09-RPH11                                                     | Not Used                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

| AIR – Additional Information Reporting (Not Used)               | AIR – Additional Information Reporting (Not Used)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | AIR – Additional Information Reporting (Not Used)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

| TP–Pharmacy Trailer                                             | TP–Pharmacy Trailer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | TP–Pharmacy Trailer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| TP01                                                            | Detail Segment Count  Number of detail segments included for the pharmacy, including the Pharmacy Header (PHA) including the Pharmacy Trailer (TP) segments                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Calculated for each transmission                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| TT–Transaction Trailer                                          | TT–Transaction Trailer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | TT–Transaction Trailer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| TT01                                                            | Transaction Control Number  Identifying control number that must be unique  Assigned by the originator of the transaction  Must match the number in TH02                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Same as TH02                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| TT02                                                            | Segment Count  Total number of segments included in the transaction including the header and trailer segments                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Calculated for each transmission                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

|                                                                             | DSP05                                                                       | 20150101                                                                    | R                                                                           |

**Sample Zero Report**

The following example illustrates a zero report using the above values.

TH*4.2*123456*01**20150108*223000*P**\\

IS*7705555555*PHARMACY NAME*#20150101#-#20150107#\

PHA*** ZZ1234567\

PAT*******REPORT*ZERO************\

DSP*****20150108******\

PRE*\

CDI*\

AIR*\

TP*7\

TT*123456*10\

#### SPMP Data Source (PSO*7*772)

##### ASAP Standard Version 4.2A Implementation

Table 33: ASAP 4.2A Baseline Dataset

| **Data Element**                    | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Requirement**   |
|-------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TH-Transaction Header Segment**   | **Purpose: To indicate the start of a transaction. It also assigns the segment terminator, data element separator, and control number.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                   |
| TH01 - Version / Release Number     | Code uniquely identifying the transaction. Format = x.x  4.2A ASAP Version 4 Release 2A                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | $$TH01^PSOASAP()  | ASAP VERSION field (#1) retrieved from the SPMP STATE PARAMETERS file (#58.41)                                                                                                                                            | Required          |
| TH02 - Transaction Control Number   | Sender assigned code uniquely identifying a transaction. This number must be used in TT01.  Recommendation: Use a Globally Unique Identifier (GUID) or other nonrepeating alphanumeric combination to populate this field.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$TH02^PSOASAP()  | VA site number (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE()) and BATCH NUMBER field (#58.42,.01) of the SPMP EXPORT BATCH file.  (ex: 500-182)                                                                                   | Required          |
| TH03 - Transaction Type             | Identifies the purpose of initiating the transaction.  01 Send/Request Transaction  02 Acknowledgment (Used in Response only.)  03 Error Receiving (Used in Response only.)  04 Void (Used to void a specific Rx in a real-time transmission, or an entire batch file that has been transmitted.  When 04 is used the appropriate transaction control number in TH02 for the specific prescription or batch file must be included. When 04 is used only the TH Header Segment and the Transaction Trailer Segment are used.) | $$TH03^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends '01'                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| TH04 - Response ID                  | Contains the Transaction Control Number of a transaction that initiated the transaction. Required in response transaction only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$TH04^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| TH05 - Creation Date                | Date the transaction was created.  Format: CCYYMMDD.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | $$TH05^PSOASAP()  | Kernel API - $$FMTHL7^XLFDT($$HTFM^XLFDT($H)  Example: 20240904                                                                                                                                                           | Required          |
| TH06 - Creation Time                | Time the transaction was created. Format: HHMMSS or HHMM. Do not use colons or other non-numeric characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$TH06^PSOASAP()  | 1. Call Kernel API - $$HTFM^XLFDT($H)which returns back UTC date/time  Example: 091522  1. Take the TIME value of the returned date/time stamp and set that data to be exactly 6 in length and append a ""Z"" to the end. | Required          |
| TH07 - File Type                    | Code specifying the type of transaction.  P Production  T Test                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$THO7^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved via the Kernel API - $$PROD^XUPROD(1)                                                                                                                                                                           | Required          |
| TH08 - Routing Number/BIN           | This field can be used for real-time transmissions that go through an intermediary or network switch to indicate, if necessary, the specific state that the transactions should be routed to.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$TH08^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| TH09 - Segment Terminator Character | This terminates the TH segment and sets the actual value of the data segment terminator for the entire transaction.  The ASAP 4.2a Standard document uses the “~” in all examples. See the “Data Element Separators and Segment Terminators” in the standard's introduction for more information.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$TH09^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the SEGMENT TERMINATOR CHAR field (#58.4001,.03) of the SPMP ASAP RECORD DEFINITION file. Tilde character "~"                                                                                              | Required          |

Table 34: Information Source (IS) 4.2A

| **Data Element**                      | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                            | **Requirement**   |
|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **IS – Information Source Segment**   | **Purpose: To convey the name and identification numbers of the entity supplying the information.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                   |                                                                                                                  |                   |
| IS01 - Unique Information Source ID   | Reference number or identification number as defined by the business partners. (Example: Phone number. However, if a phone number is used to populate this field, do not include hyphens).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$IS01^PSOASAP()  | Hard-coded "VA"\_facility code (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE())  Example: VA500                            | Required          |
| IS02 - Information Source Entity Name | Entity name of the Information Source.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$IS02^PSOASAP()  | OFFICIAL VA NAME field (#100) retrieved from the INSTITUTION file (#4)  Example: OKLAHOMA CITY VA MEDICAL CENTER | Required          |
| IS03 - Message                        | Freeform text message. Use of this field is defined by the PDMP.  Many PDMPs may designate this field to hold the submission period date range of the file transmitted. When used to indicate the date range, it must be the first data text in the field and must be inserted with using the following layout (where ""#"" and ""-"" are those literal characters): #CCYYMMDD#-#CCYYMMDD#  For example, a pharmacy may be submitting records for the reporting period of March 1, 2012 through March 7, 2012 but only filled reportable prescriptions on March 3, and March 5. The full submission period date range would be reported in IS03 as #20120301#-#20120307#  It is up to the PDMP to further define how to enter the submission date range for exceptional cases, such as for late submission records.  IS03 can also be used to show the date range for Zero Reports. | $$IS03^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                            | Optional          |

Table 35: Pharmacy Header (PHA) 4.2A

| **Data Element**                                  | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                          | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                          | **Requirement**   |
|---------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PHA –  Pharmacy Header Segment**                | **Purpose: To identify the pharmacy or the dispensing prescriber. It is required that information be provided in at least one of the following fields: PHA01, PHA02, or PH03.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                                                |                   |
| PHA01 - National Provider Identifier (NPI)        | Identifier assigned to the pharmacy by CMS. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                     | $$PHA01^PSOASAP() | NPI INSTITUTION field (#101) retrieved via the Kernel API $$NPI^XUSNPI (ICR# 4532) from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                             | Optional          |
| PHA02 - NCPDP/NABP Provider ID                    | Identifier assigned to pharmacy by the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                         | $$PHA02^PSOASAP() | NCPDP NUMBER field (#1008) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PHA03 - DEA Number                                | Identifier assigned to the pharmacy by the Drug Enforcement Administration. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                     | $$PHA03^PSOASAP() | FACILITY DEA NUMBER (#4,52) retrieved via the Kernel API $$WHAT^XUAF4 (ICR# 2171) using the RELATED INSTITUTION field (#100) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) | Optional          |
| PHA04 - Pharmacy or Dispensing Prescriber Name    | Freeform name of the pharmacy.  If a dispensing prescriber, the prescriber’s name and professional degree should be entered, such as John Doe MD.                                                                             | $$PHA04^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#.01) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                                    | Optional          |
| PHA05 - Address Information - 1                   | Freeform text for address information.                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$PHA05^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK STREET ADDRESS field (#.02) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                            | Optional          |
| PHA06 - Address Information - 2                   | Freeform text for additional address information.                                                                                                                                                                             | $$PHA06^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA07 - City Address                              | Freeform text for city name.                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$PHA07^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK CITY field (#.07) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                      | Optional          |
| PHA08 - State Address                             | U.S. Postal Service state code.                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$PHA08^PSOASAP() | ABBREVIATION field (#1) retrieved from the STATE file (#5) via pointer MAILING FRANK STATE field (#.08) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  Example: OK         | Optional          |
| PHA09 - ZIP Code Address                          | U.S. Postal Service ZIP Code. Use if available.                                                                                                                                                                               | $$PHA09^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK ZIP+4 CODE field (#.05) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  hyphen excluded  Example: 731045028                                           | Optional          |
| PHA10 - Phone Number                              | Complete phone number including area code.                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PHA10^PSOASAP() | AREA CODE (#.03) and PHONE NUMBER (#.04) fields retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  hyphens excluded  Example: 4056948387                               | Optional          |
| PHA11 - Contact Name                              | Freeform name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$PHA11^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA12 - Chain Site ID                             | Store number assigned by the chain to the pharmacy location. Used when PDMP needs to identify the specific pharmacy from which information is required.                                                                       | $$PHA12^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA13 - Pharmacy's Permit Number / License Number | Used to help identify the sending pharmacy                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PHA13^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |

If the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) is not the United States, retrieved from the PROVINCE field (#.1171) in the PATIENT file (#2).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Optional          |

If the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) is not the United States, retrieved from the POSTAL CODE (#.1172) in the PATIENT file (#2).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Required          |

Do not include hyphens in the number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | $$PAT17^PSOASAP() | API ADD^VADPT is called and it is a supported reference to the REGISTRATION API.  (ICR# 10061).  Retrieved using the following logic:  Use PHONE NUMBER [RESIDENCE] field (#.131) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use PHONE NUMBER [CELLULAR] field (#.134) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else PHONE NUMBER [WORK] field (#.132) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use K-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.21011) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use K2-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.2199) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use E-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.33011) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use E2-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.331011) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use AREA CODE field (#.03) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) concatenated to the PHONE NUMBER field (#.04) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) | Optional          |

| PAT19 - Gender Code                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Code indicating the sex of the patient if required by the PDMP.
