                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$DSP20^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| DSP21 - Electronic Prescription Order Number          | This field will be populated with the Initiator Control Reference from field UIH-030-01 in the SCRIPT standard.  DSP20 and DSP21 should be reported as a pair to the PDMP and the PDMP will decide which one, if not both, it decides to capture. By requiring the reporting of both, this avoids specification variations that would require custom programming to accommodate a PDMP. Also, the information reported by the pharmacy management system will depend on the information received at the pharmacy with an electronic prescription. | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| DSP22 - Quantity Prescribed                           | This field has been added in order to add clarity to the value reported in DSP13 Partial Fill Indicator                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | $$DSP22^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Not used          |
| DSP23 - Rx SIG                                        | This field would capture the actual directions printed on the prescription vial label. If the directions exceed 200 characters, truncation would be allowed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$DSP23^PSOASAP() | Concatenate the SIG1 multiple (#52.04,.01) into a single string                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Optional          |
| DSP24 - Treatment Type                                | While this field can be used to indicate that the prescription was for opioid dependency treatment when Code 02 is used, it can also be used to provide other reasons for the opioid prescription through use of the additional codes.  01 = Not Used for Opioid Dependency Treatment  02 = Used for Opioid Dependency Treatment  03 = Pain Associated with Active and Aftercare Cancer Treatment  04 = Palliative Care in Conjunction with a Serious Illness  05 = End-of-Life and Hospice Care  06 = A Pregnant Individual with a Pre-existing Prescription for Opioids  07 = Acute Pain for an Individual with an Existing Opioid Prescription for Chronic Pain  08 = Individuals Pursuing an Active Taper of Opioid Medications  09 = Patient is Participating in a Pain Management Contract  99 = Other (trading partner agreed upon reason)  *Codes 03 through 99 added 6/28/2017.  These new codes can only be reported if provided by the prescriber with the prescription.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | $$DSP24^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| DSP25 - Diagnosis Code                                | This field is used to report the ICD-10 code.  If required by a PDMP, this field would be populated only when the ICD-10 code is included with the prescription.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Optional          |

Table 38: Prescriber Information (PRE) 4.2A

| **Data Element**                           | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Requirement**   |
|--------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PRE –  Prescriber Information Segment**  | **Purpose: To identify the prescriber of the prescription.**  **Level: Detail**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                               |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                   |
| PRE01 - National Provider Identifier (NPI) | Identifier assigned to the prescriber by CMS.  If the prescriber does not have a DEA number and prescribed a noncontrolled substance that is a reportable drug to the PDMP, this field should be used as the identifier. | $$PRE01^PSOASAP() | Retrieved via the Kernel API $$NPI^XUSNPI using the prescription fill provider  ICR# 4532                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Optional          |
| PRE02 - DEA Number                         | Identifying number assigned to a prescriber or an institution by the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA).                                                                                                              | $$PRE02^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from one of the following locations in respective order:  Provider DEA# associated with the CPRS order  The ORDER ENTRY/RESULTS REPORTING procedure ARCHIVE^ORDEA retrieves the value at the DEA # field (#101.52,10) of the ORDER DEA ARCHIVE INFO file.  The first piece by ""-"" is returned.  ICR# 5709  Prescription fill provider or facility DEA#  The Kernel API $$DEA^XUSER retrieves the value at the DEA NUMBER field (#200.5321,.01) of the NEW PERSON file. The first piece by ""-"" is returned.  ICR# 2343  Pharmacy DEA#  the Kernel API $$WHAT^XUAF4 is called to return the FACILITY DEA NUMBER field (#4,52) of the INSTITUTION file.  ICR# 2171                                                                             | Required          |
| PRE03 - DEA Number Suffix                  | Identifying number assigned to a prescriber by an institution when the institution's DEA number is used, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                        | $$PRE03^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from one of the following locations in respective order:  Provider DEA# suffix associated with the CPRS order  The ORDER ENTRY/RESULTS REPORTING procedure ARCHIVE^ORDEA retrieves the value at the DEA # field (#101.52,10) of the ORDER DEA ARCHIVE INFO file.  The 2nd piece by ""-"" is returned.  ICR# 5709  Prescription fill provider or facility DEA# suffix  The Kernel API $$DEA^XUSER retrieves the value at the DEA NUMBER field (#200.5321,.01) from the NEW DEA #'S multiple of the NEW PERSON file. The 2nd piece by ""-"" is returned.  ICR# 2343  VA#  If DEA# from PHA03 is equal to the DEA# from PHA02, then The Kernel API $$DEA^XUSER retrieves the value at the VA# field (#200,53.3) of the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 2171 | Optional          |
| PRE04 - Prescriber State License Number    | Identification assigned to the Prescriber by the State Licensing Board. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                    | $$PRE04^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| PRE05 - Last Name                          | Prescriber's last name. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PRE05^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#200,.01) from the NEW PERSON file. | PRE06 - First Name                         | Prescriber's first name. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                   | $$PRE06^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#200,.01) from the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PRE07 - Middle Name                        | Prescriber's middle name or initial. Used if required and is available in the pharmacy system.                                                                                                                           | $$PRE07^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#200,.01) from the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PRE08 - Phone Number                       | The prescriber's primary phone number.                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$PRE08^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from the PHONE NUMBER # field (#200,.132) of the NEW PERSON file. ASAP version 4.2a Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | $$AIR01^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR02 - State Issued Rx Serial Number                        | Number assigned to state issued serialized prescription blank. Required if state issues serialized prescription pads for prescribers to use.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$AIR02^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR03 - ID Issuing Jurisdiction                              | Code identifying the jurisdiction that issues the ID contained in AIR05.  Used if required by the PDMP.  ASAP version 4.2a Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$AIR03^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR04 - ID Qualifier of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx | Code indicating the type of ID in AIR05 if required by the PDMP.  01 Military ID  02 State Issued ID  03 Unique System ID  04 Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)  05 Passport ID  06 Driver's License ID  07 Social Security Number  08 Tribal ID  99 Other (Trading partner agreed upon ID)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$AIR04^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR05 - ID of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx           | ID number of the person dropping off or picking up the prescription, if required by the PDMP.  Because historically there has been a noticeable amount of extraneous information entered in this field, which has interfered with data analysis, it is important that every effort be made to ensure that only the unadorned customer ID and no additional information be entered into this field.                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$AIR05^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR06 - Relationship of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx | Code indicating the relationship to the person dropping off or picking up Rx, if required by the PDMP.  01 Patient  02 Parent/Legal Guardian  03 Spouse  04 Caregiver  99 Other                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$AIR06^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR07 - Last Name of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx    | Last name of the person dropping off or picking up Rx, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$AIR07^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR08 - First Name of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx   | First name of the person dropping off or picking up Rx, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | $$AIR08^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR09 - Last Name or Initials of Pharmacist                  | Last name or initials of the pharmacist dispensing the medication, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$AIR09^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR10 - First Name of Pharmacist                             | First name of the pharmacist dispensing the medication, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | $$AIR10^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR11 - Dropping Off/Picking Up Identifier Qualifier         | Additional qualifier for the ID contained in AIR05.  01 Person Dropping Off  02 Person Picking Up  98 Unknown/Not Applicable (An example of Unknown: Where the pharmacist does not know which person it is. Or there is no ID to collect at drop-off, such as when a prescription is phoned in. An example of Not Applicable: When the prescription is delivered.)  Both 01 and 02 cannot be required by a PDMP. Usage of this field depends on whether a PDMP has interest in knowing whether the information supplied in fields AIR04–AIR08 is for the person dropping off or picking up the prescription. | $$AIR11^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |

Table 41: Pharmacy Trailer (TP) 4.2A

| **Data Element**                  | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                          | **Requirement**   |
|-----------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TP – Pharmacy Trailer Segment** | **Purpose: To identify the end of data for a given pharmacy and provide the count of the total number of detail segments included for the pharmacy, including the pharmacy header (PHA) and the pharmacy trailer (TP) segments.**  **Level: Summary**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                                |                   |
| TP01 - Detail Segment Count       | Number of detail segments included for the pharmacy including the pharmacy header (PHA) and the pharmacy trailer (TP) segments.                                                                                                                                                  | $$TP01^PSOASAP()  | Calculates the number of detail segments included (PAT, DSP, PRE, CDI, AIR) in addition to the pharmacy header (PHA) and pharmacy trailer (TP) | Required          |

Table 42: Transaction Trailer (TT) 4.2A

| **Data Element**                      | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                  | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                  | **Requirement**   |
|---------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TT –  Transaction Trailer Segment** | **Purpose: To indicate the end of the transaction and provide the count of the total number of segments included in the transaction.**  **Level: Summary**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                        |                   |
| TT01 - Transaction Control Number     | Identifying control number that must be unique. Assigned by the originator of the transaction. Must match the number in TH02 sent by the pharmacy.                                    | $$TT01^PSOASAP()  | VA site number (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE()) and BATCH NUMBER field (#58.42,.01) of the SPMP EXPORT BATCH file. (ex: 500-182) | Required          |
| TT02 - Segment Count                  | Total number of segments included in the transaction including the header (TH) and trailer (TT) segments.                                                                             | $$TT02^PSOASAP()  | Calculated for each transmission.                                                                                                      | Required          |

##### ASAP Standard Version 4.2B Implementation

Table 43: ASAP 4.2B Baseline Dataset - Transaction Header (TH) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                    | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **Requirement**   |
|-------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TH – Transaction Header Segment** | **Purpose: To indicate the start of a transaction. It also assigns the segment terminator, data element separator, and control number.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                   |
| TH01 - Version / Release Number     | Used to identify the transaction Version / Release.  Format = x.x 4.2B  ASAP Version 4 Release 2B                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$TH01^PSOASAP()  | ASAP VERSION field (#1) retrieved from the SPMP STATE PARAMETERS file (#58.41)                                                                                                                                          | Required          |
| TH02 - Transaction Control Number   | Sender assigned code uniquely identifying a transaction. This number must be used in TT01.  Recommendation: Use a Globally Unique Identifier (GUID) or other nonrepeating alphanumeric combination to populate this field.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$TH02^PSOASAP()  | VA site number (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE()) and BATCH NUMBER field (#58.42,.01) of the SPMP EXPORT BATCH file. (ex: 500-182)                                                                                  | Required          |
| TH03 - Transaction Type             | Identifies the purpose of initiating the transaction.  01 Send/Request Transaction  02 Acknowledgment (Used in Response only.)  03 Error Receiving (Used in Response only.)  04 Void (Used to void a specific Rx in a real-time transmission, or an entire batch file that has been transmitted.  When 04 is used the appropriate transaction control number in TH02 for the specific prescription or batch file must be included. When 04 is used only the TH Header Segment and the Transaction Trailer Segment are used.) | $$TH03^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends '01'                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Optional          |
| TH04 - Response ID                  | Contains the Transaction Control Number of a transaction that initiated the transaction. Required in response transaction only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$TH04^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| TH05 - Creation Date                | Date the transaction was created. Format: CCYYMMDD.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$TH05^PSOASAP()  | Kernel API - $$FMTHL7^XLFDT($$HTFM^XLFDT($H)  Example: 20240904                                                                                                                                                         | Required          |
| TH06 - Creation Time                | Time the transaction was created. Format: HHMMSS or HHMM. Do not use colons or other non-numeric characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$TH06^PSOASAP()  | 1. Call Kernel API - $$HTFM^XLFDT($H)which returns back UTC date/time  Example: 091522  1. Take the TIME value of the returned date/time stamp and set that data to be exactly 6 in length and append a "Z" to the end. | Required          |
| TH07 - File Type                    | Code specifying the type of transaction.  P Production  T Test                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$THO7^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved via the Kernel API - $$PROD^XUPROD(1)                                                                                                                                                                         | Required          |
| TH08 - Routing Number/BIN           | This field can be used for real-time transmissions that go through an intermediary or network switch to indicate, if necessary, the specific state that the transactions should be routed to.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$TH08^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| TH09 - Segment Terminator Character | This terminates the TH segment and sets the actual value of the data segment terminator for the entire transaction.  The ASAP 4.2b Standard document uses the “~” in all examples. See the “Data Element Separators and Segment Terminators” in the standard's introduction for more information.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$TH09^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the SEGMENT TERMINATOR CHAR field (#58.4001,.03) of the SPMP ASAP RECORD DEFINITION file. Tilde character "~"                                                                                            | Required          |

Table 44: Information Source (IS) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                      | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                            | **Requirement**   |
|---------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **IS – Information Source Segment**   | **Purpose: To convey the name and identification numbers of the entity supplying the information.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                   |                                                                                                                  |                   |
| IS01 - Unique Information Source ID   | Reference number or identification number as defined by the business partners. (Example: Phone number. However, if a phone number is used to populate this field, do not include hyphens.)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | $$IS01^PSOASAP()  | Hard-coded "VA"\_facility code (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE())  Example: VA500                            | Required          |
| IS02 - Information Source Entity Name | Entity name of the Information Source.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$IS02^PSOASAP()  | OFFICIAL VA NAME field (#100) retrieved from the INSTITUTION file (#4)  Example: OKLAHOMA CITY VA MEDICAL CENTER | Required          |
| IS03 - Message                        | Freeform text message. Use of this field is defined by the PDMP. Many PDMPs may designate this field to hold the submission period date range of the file transmitted. When used to indicate the date range, it must be the first data text in the field and must be inserted with using the following layout (where """"#"""" and """"-"""" are those literal characters): #CCYYMMDD#-#CCYYMMDD#  For example, a pharmacy may be submitting records for the reporting period of December 5, 2019 through December 11, 2019 but only filled reportable prescriptions on December 5 and December 7. The full submission period date range would be reported in IS03 as #20191205#-#20191211#  It is up to the PDMP to further define how to enter the submission date range for exceptional cases, such as for late submission records.  IS03 can also be used to show the date range for Zero Reports. | $$IS03^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                            | Optional          |

Table 45: Pharmacy Header (PHA) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                                | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                          | **Requirement**   |
|-------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PHA – Pharmacy Header Segment**               | **Purpose: To identify the pharmacy or the dispensing prescriber. It is required that information be provided in at least one of the following fields: PHA01, PHA02, or PH03.  (Note: Situation for use of PHA04 through PHA13 is if needed by the state PDMP to further identify the sending pharmacy.)**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                                                |                   |
| PHA01 - National Provider Identifier (NPI)      | Identifier assigned to the pharmacy by CMS. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$PHA01^PSOASAP() | NPI INSTITUTION field (#101) retrieved via the Kernel API $$NPI^XUSNPI (ICR# 4532) from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                             | Optional          |
| PHA02 - NCPDP/NABP Provider ID                  | Identifier assigned to pharmacy by the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PHA02^PSOASAP() | NCPDP NUMBER field (#1008) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PHA03 - DEA Number                              | Identifier assigned to the pharmacy by the Drug Enforcement Administration. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$PHA03^PSOASAP() | FACILITY DEA NUMBER (#4,52) retrieved via the Kernel API $$WHAT^XUAF4 (ICR# 2171) using the RELATED INSTITUTION field (#100) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) | Optional          |
| PHA04 - Pharmacy or Dispensing Prescriber Name  | Freeform name of the pharmacy.  If a dispensing prescriber, the prescriber’s name and professional degree should be entered, such as John Doe MD.                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$PHA04^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#.01) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                                    | Optional          |
| PHA05 - Address Information – 1                 | Freeform text for address information.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$PHA05^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK STREET ADDRESS field (#.02) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                            | Optional          |
| PHA06 - Address Information - 2                 | Freeform text for additional address information.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$PHA06^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA07 - City Address                            | Free-form text for city name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$PHA07^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK CITY field (#.07) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                      | Optional          |
| PHA08 - State Address                           | U.S. Postal Service state code.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$PHA08^PSOASAP() | ABBREVIATION field (#1) retrieved from the STATE file (#5) via pointer MAILING FRANK STATE field (#.08) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  Example: OK         | Optional          |
| PHA09 - ZIP Code Address                        | U.S. Postal Service ZIP Code. Use if available. Exclude hyphen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$PHA09^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK ZIP+4 CODE field (#.05) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  hyphen excluded  Example: 731045028                                           | Optional          |
| PHA10 - Phone Number                            | Complete phone number including area code. Exclude hyphens.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$PHA10^PSOASAP() | AREA CODE (#.03) and PHONE NUMBER (#.04) fields retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  hyphens excluded  Example: 4056948387                               | Optional          |
| PHA11 - Contact Name                            | Freeform name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$PHA11^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA12 - Chain Site ID                           | Store number assigned by the chain to the pharmacy location. Used when PDMP needs to identify the specific pharmacy from which information is required.                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$PHA12^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA13 - Pharmacy's Permit Number/License Number | Used to help identify the sending pharmacy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$PHA13^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |

Table 46: Patient Information (PAT) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Requirement**   |
|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PAT – Patient Information**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **Purpose: Used to report the patient’s name and basic information as contained in the pharmacy record**  **Level: Detail**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                   |
| PAT01 - ID Qualifier of Patient Identifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Code identifying the jurisdiction that issues the ID in PAT03.  Used if the PDMP requires such identification.  ASAP version 4.2b Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$PAT01^PSOASAP() | VistA sends 'US'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PAT02 - ID Qualifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Code to identify the type of ID in PAT03. If PAT02 is used, PAT03 is required.  01 Military ID  02 State Issued ID  03 Unique System ID  04 Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)  05 Passport ID  06 Driver’s License ID  07 Social Security Number  08 Tribal ID  09 Vendor Specific (such as Appriss Health, Experian, LexisNexis)  10 Veterinary Patient Microchip Number  99 Other (Trading partner agreed upon ID, such as cardholder ID.)                                          | $$PAT02^PSOASAP() | VistA sends '07'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PAT03 - ID of Patient                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Identification number for the patient as indicated in PAT02.  An example would be the driver’s license number.  This field can only be populated with code 10 when provided on the prescription.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | $$PAT03^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from the SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER field (#2,.09) of the PATIENT file via the REGISTRATION DEM^VADPT API  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PAT04 - ID Qualifier of Additional Patient Identifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Code identifying the jurisdiction that issues the ID in PAT06. Used if the PDMP requires such identification.  ASAP version 4.2b Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$PAT04^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| PAT05 - Additional Patient ID Qualifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Code to identify the type of ID in PAT06 if the PDMP requires a second identifier. If PAT05 is used, PAT06 is required.  01 Military ID  02 State Issued ID  03 Unique System ID  04 Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)  05 Passport ID  06 Driver's License ID  07 Social Security Number  08 Tribal ID  09 Vendor Specific (such as Appriss Health, Experian, LexisNexis)  10 Veterinary Patient Microchip Number  99 Other (Trading partner agreed upon ID, such as cardholder ID.) | $$PAT05^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| PAT06 - Additional ID                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Identification that might be required by the PDMP to further identify the individual. An example might be in that PAT03 driver's license is required and in PAT06 Social Security number is also required.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$PAT06^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
