| DSP14 - Pharmacist National Provider Identifier (NPI) | Identifier assigned to the pharmacist by CMS. This number can be used to identify the pharmacist dispensing the medication. pharmacist.  ICR# 4532                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Optional          |
| DSP15 - Pharmacist State License Number               | Assigned to the pharmacist by the State Licensing Board. This data element can be used to identify the pharmacist dispensing the medication. | DSP16 - Classification Code for Payment Type          | Code identifying the type of payment, i.e. how it was paid for, if required by the PDMP.  01 Private Pay (Cash, Charge, Credit Card)  02 Medicaid  03 Medicare  04 Commercial Insurance  05 Military Installations and VA  06 Workers’ Compensation  07 Indian Nations  99 Other                | $$DSP16^PSOASAP() | VistA sends '05' Optional          |
| DSP17 - Date Sold                                     | This field is used to determine the date the prescription was dispensed (sold to, picked up by, or otherwise left the pharmacy), not the date it was prepared.  This date could be captured from the point-of-sale (POS) system, if the pharmacy has a POS system, and there is a bidirectional flow with the pharmacy management system in order to capture and report this date. Or it could be captured and reported from a will-call management system, integrated with the pharmacy management system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$DSP17^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from one of the following locations in respective order via $$DSP05^PSOASAP():  Void  RETURN TO STOCK LOG subfile (#52.07)  RELEASED DATE/TIME field (#21)  Original Fill  PRESCRIPTION file (#52)  RELEASED DATE/TIME field (#31)  Refill  REFILL subfile (#52.1)  RELEASED DATE/TIME field (#17)  Partial  PARTIAL subfile (#52.2)  RELEASED DATE/TIME (#8) | Not Used          |
| DSP18 - RxNorm Product Qualifier                      | 01 Semantic Clinical Drug (SCD)  02 Semantic Branded Drug (SBD)  03 Generic Package (GPCK)  04 Branded Package (BPCK)  RxNorm code that is populated in the DRU-010-09 field in the SCRIPT transaction.  DSP18 and DSP19 are placeholder fields pending RxNorm becoming an industry standard. These fields should not be required until such time. | DSP19 - RxNorm Code                                   | Used for electronic prescriptions to capture the prescribed drug product identification.                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| DSP20 - Electronic Prescription Reference Number      | This field should be populated with the Initiator Reference Number from field UIB-030-01 in the SCRIPT transaction.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$DSP20^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| DSP21 - Electronic Prescription Order Number          | This field will be populated with the Initiator Control Reference from field UIH-030-01 in the SCRIPT standard.  DSP20 and DSP21 should be reported as a pair to the PDMP and the PDMP will decide which one, if not both, it decides to capture. By requiring the reporting of both, this avoids specification variations that would require custom programming to accommodate a PDMP. Also, the information reported by the pharmacy management system will depend on the information received at the pharmacy with an electronic prescription.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | $$DSP21^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| DSP22 - Quantity Prescribed                           | This field has been added in order to add clarity to the value reported in DSP13 Partial Fill Indicator. (Revised 08/17/2020)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | $$DSP22^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Not used          |
| DSP23 - Rx SIG                                        | This field would capture the actual directions printed on the prescription vial label. If the directions exceed 200 characters, truncation would be allowed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$DSP23^PSOASAP() | Concatenate the SIG1 multiple (#52.04,.01) into a single string                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Optional          |
| DSP24 - Treatment Type                                | This field is used to explain the reason for an opioid prescription. If the prescription is not for an opioid, then this field would not be used.  01 = Not Used for Opioid Dependency Treatment  02 = Used for Opioid Dependency Treatment  03 = Pain Associated with Active and Aftercare Cancer Treatment  04 = Palliative Care in Conjunction with a Serious Illness  05 = End-of-Life and Hospice Care  06 = A Pregnant Individual with a Pre-existing Prescription for Opioids  07 = Acute Pain for an Individual with an Existing Opioid Prescription for Chronic Pain  08 = Individuals Pursuing an Active Taper of Opioid Medications  09 = Patient is Participating in a Pain Management Contract  10 = Acute Opioid Therapy  11 = Chronic Opioid Therapy  99 = Other (trading partner agreed upon reason or not indicated)  The definitions of Codes 03 to 11 can only be reported if mandated by the state to be provided by the prescriber on the prescription order.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$DSP24^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| DSP25 - Diagnosis Code                                | This field is used to report the ICD-10 code. If required by a PDMP, this field would be populated only when the ICD-10 code is included with the prescription. Exclude the decimal point.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$DSP25^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |

Table 48: Prescriber Information (PRE) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                                                | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                      | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | **Requirement**   |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PRE – Prescriber Information Segment**                        | **Purpose: To identify the prescriber of the prescription.**  **Level: Detail**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |
| PRE01 - National Provider Identifier (NPI)                      | Identifier assigned to the prescriber by CMS.  If the prescriber does not have a DEA number, and prescribed a noncontrolled substance that is a reportable drug to the PDMP, this field should be used as the identifier. | $$PRE01^PSOASAP() | Retrieved via the Kernel API $$NPI^XUSNPI using the prescription fill provider  ICR# 4532                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Optional          |
| PRE02 - DEA Number                                              | Identifying number assigned to a prescriber or an institution by the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA). Required when the prescription is for a DEA-defined controlled substance.                                     | $$PRE02^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from one of the following locations in respective order:  Provider DEA# associated with the CPRS order  The ORDER ENTRY/RESULTS REPORTING procedure ARCHIVE^ORDEA retrieves the value at the DEA # field (#101.52,10) of the ORDER DEA ARCHIVE INFO file.  The first piece by "-" is returned.  ICR# 5709  Prescription fill provider or facility DEA#  The Kernel API $$DEA^XUSER retrieves the value at the DEA NUMBER field (#200.5321,.01) of the NEW PERSON file. The first piece by “-" is returned.  ICR# 2343  Pharmacy DEA#  The Kernel API $$WHAT^XUAF4 is called to return the FACILITY DEA NUMBER field (#4,52) of the INSTITUTION file.  ICR# 2171                                                                             | Required          |
| PRE03 - DEA Number Suffix                                       | Identifying number assigned to a prescriber by an institution when the institution's DEA number is used, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                         | $$PRE03^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from one of the following locations in respective order:  Provider DEA# suffix associated with the CPRS order  The ORDER ENTRY/RESULTS REPORTING procedure ARCHIVE^ORDEA retrieves the value at the DEA # field (#101.52,10) of the ORDER DEA ARCHIVE INFO file.  The 2nd piece by “-" is returned.  ICR# 5709  Prescription fill provider or facility DEA# suffix  The Kernel API $$DEA^XUSER retrieves the value at the DEA NUMBER field (#200.5321,.01) from the NEW DEA #'S multiple of the NEW PERSON file. The 2nd piece by “-" is returned.  ICR# 2343  VA#  If DEA# from PHA03 is equal to the DEA# from PHA02, then The Kernel API $$DEA^XUSER retrieves the value at the VA# field (#200,53.3) of the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 2171 | Optional          |
| PRE04 - Prescriber License Number                               | Identification assigned to the prescriber by the State Licensing Board of a state or jurisdiction. This field can be used for veterinarian prescriptions. Used if required by the PDMP.                                   | $$PRE04^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Optional          |
| PRE05 - Last Name                                               | Prescriber's last name. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                     | $$PRE05^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#200,.01) from the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PRE06 - First Name                                              | Prescriber's first name. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PRE06^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#200,.01) from the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PRE07 - Middle Name                                             | Prescriber's middle name or initial. Used if required and is available in the pharmacy system.                                                                                                                            | $$PRE07^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#200,.01) from the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PRE08 - Phone Number                                            | The prescriber's primary phone number.                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PRE08^PSOASAP() | Retrieved from the PHONE NUMBER # field (#200,.132) of the NEW PERSON file.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PRE09 - XDEA Number                                             | This field gives a PDMP the option of requiring the XDEA Number (NADEAN) in the PRE Segment when the prescription is for opioid dependency.                                                                               | $$PRE09^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Not Used          |
| PRE10 - Jurisdiction or State Issuing Prescriber License Number | This field can be used to further identify the information in PRE04 depending on PDMP’s need for this information.                                                                                                        | $$PRE10^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Optional          |

Table 49: Compound Drug Ingredient (CDI) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                                   | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**   | **Requirement**   |
|----------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------|-------------------|
| **CDI –  Compound Drug Ingredient Detail Segment** | **Purpose: To identify the individual ingredients that make up a compound. To identify the individual ingredients that make up a compound.**  **Level: Detail**  **Requirement: Not Used**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                   |                         |                   |
| CDI01 - Compound Drug Ingredient Sequence Number   | The first reportable ingredient is 1. Each additional reportable ingredient is incremented by 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$CDI01^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Required          |
| CDI02 - Product ID Qualifier                       | Code to identify the type of product ID contained in CDI03.  01 NDC  02 UPC  03 HRI  04 UPN  05 DIN  06 Compound (This code is not used in this segment.)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$CDI02^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Required          |
| CDI03 - Product ID                                 | Full product identification as indicated in CDI02, including leading zeros without punctuation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$CDI03^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Required          |
| CDI04 - Component Ingredient Quantity              | Metric decimal quantity of the ingredient identified in CDI03.  Example: 2.5.  Appendix B in ASAP version 4.2b Standard contains specific instructions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$CDI04^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Required          |
| CDI05 - Compound Drug Dosage Units Code            | Identifies the unit of measure for the quantity dispensed in CDI04, if required by the prescription-monitoring program.  Appendix B in ASAP version 4.2b Standard contains specific instructions.  01 Each (used to report solid dosage units or indivisible package)  02 Milliliters (ml) (for liters adjust to the decimal milliliter equivalent)  03 Grams (gm) (for milligrams adjust to the decimal gram equivalent) | $$CDI05^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |

Table 50: Additional Information Reporting (AIR) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                                             | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**   | **Requirement**   |
|--------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------|-------------------|
| **AIR – Additional Information Reporting Segment**           | **Purpose: To report a prescription blank serial number, information on person dropping off or picking up the prescription, or information regarding the prescription not included in the other detail segments. Note: If this segment is used, at least one of the data elements (fields) will be required.**  **Level: Detail**  **Requirement: Optional**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                   |                         |                   |
| AIR01 - State Issuing Rx Serial Number                       | U.S.P.S. state code of state that issued serialized prescription blank. This is required if AIR02 is used.  ASAP version 4.2b Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$AIR01^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR02 - State Issued Rx Serial Number                        | Number assigned to state issued serialized prescription blank. Required if state issues serialized prescription pads for prescribers to use.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$AIR02^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR03 - ID Issuing Jurisdiction                              | Code identifying the jurisdiction that issues the ID contained in AIR05.  Used if required by the PDMP.  ASAP version 4.2b Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$AIR03^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR04 - ID Qualifier of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx | Code indicating the type of ID in AIR05 if required by the PDMP.  01 Military ID  02 State Issued ID  03 Unique System ID  04 Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)  05 Passport ID  06 Driver’s License ID  07 Social Security Number  08 Tribal ID  09 Vendor Specific (such as Appriss Health, Experian, LexisNexis)  10 Veterinary Patient Microchip Number  99 Other (trading partner agreed upon ID such as cardholder ID)                                                                                                                                                                               | $$AIR04^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR05 - ID of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx           | ID number of the person dropping off or picking up the prescription, if required by the PDMP.  Because historically there has been a noticeable amount of extraneous information entered in this field, which has interfered with data analysis, it is important that every effort be made to ensure that only the unadorned customer ID and no additional information be entered into this field.                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$AIR05^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR06 - Relationship of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx | Code indicating the relationship to the person, dropping off or picking up Rx, if required by the PDMP.  01 Patient  02 Parent/Legal Guardian  03 Spouse  04 Caregiver  99 Other                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$AIR06^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR07 - Last Name of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx    | Last name of the person dropping off or picking up Rx, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$AIR07^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR08 - First Name of Person Dropping Off or Picking Up Rx   | First name of the person dropping off or picking up the Rx, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$AIR08^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR09 - Last Name or Initials of Pharmacist                  | Last name or initials of the pharmacist dispensing the medication, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$AIR09^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR10 - First Name of Pharmacist                             | First name of the pharmacist dispensing the medication, if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$AIR10^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |
| AIR11 - Dropping Off/Picking Up Identifier Qualifier         | Additional qualifier for the ID contained in AIR05.  01 Person Dropping Off  02 Person Picking Up  98 Unknown/Not Applicable (An example of Unknown: Where the pharmacist does not know which person it is. Or there is no ID to collect at drop-off, such as when a prescription is phoned in.  An example of Not Applicable: When the prescription is delivered.)  Both 01 and 02 cannot be required by a PDMP. Usage of this field depends on whether a PDMP has interest in knowing whether the information supplied in fields AIR04–AIR08 is for the person dropping off or picking up the prescription. | $$AIR11^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)   | Optional          |

Table 51: Pharmacy Trailer (TP) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                  | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                          | **Requirement**   |
|-----------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TP – Pharmacy Trailer Segment** | **Purpose: To identify the end of data for a given pharmacy and provide the count of the total number of detail segments included for the pharmacy, including the pharmacy header (PHA) and the pharmacy trailer (TP) segments.**  **Level: Summary**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                                |                   |
| TP01 - Detail Segment Count       | Number of detail segments included for the pharmacy including the pharmacy header (PHA) and the pharmacy trailer (TP) segments.                                                                                                                                                  | $$TP01^PSOASAP()  | Calculates the number of detail segments included (PAT, DSP, PRE, CDI, AIR) in addition to the pharmacy header (PHA) and pharmacy trailer (TP) | Required          |

Table 52: Transaction Trailer (TT) 4.2B

| **Data Element**                     | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                  | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                   | **Requirement**   |
|--------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TT – Transaction Trailer Segment** | **Purpose: To indicate the end of the transaction and provide the count of the total number of segments included in the transaction.**  **Level: Summary**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                         |                   |
| TT01 - Transaction Control Number    | Identifying control number that must be unique. Assigned by the originator of the transaction. Must match the number in TH02 sent by the pharmacy.                                    | $$TT01^PSOASAP()  | VA site number (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE()) and BATCH NUMBER field (#58.42,.01) of the SPMP EXPORT BATCH file.  (ex: 500-182) | Required          |
| TT02 - Segment Count                 | Total number of segments included in the transaction including the header (TH) and trailer (TT) segments.                                                                             | $$TT02^PSOASAP()  | Calculated for each transmission.                                                                                                       | Required          |

##### ASAP Standard Version 5.0 Implementation

Table 53: ASAP 5.0 Baseline Dataset - Transaction Header (TH) 5.0

| **Data Element**                    | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **Requirement**   |
|-------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **TH – Transaction Header Segment** | **Purpose: To indicate the start of a transaction. It also assigns the segment terminator, data element separator, and control number.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                   |
| TH01 - Version / Release Number     | Used to identify the transaction Version/Release.  Format = x.x (5.0)  ASAP Version 5 Release 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$TH01^PSOASAP()  | ASAP VERSION field (#1) retrieved from the SPMP STATE PARAMETERS file (#58.41)                                                                                                                                          | Required          |
| TH02 - Transaction Control Number   | Sender assigned code uniquely identifying a transaction. This number must be used in TT01.  Recommendation: Use a Globally Unique Identifier (GUID) or other nonrepeating alphanumeric combination to populate this field.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$TH02^PSOASAP()  | VA site number (via Registration API $$SITE^VASITE()) and BATCH NUMBER field (#58.42,.01) of the SPMP EXPORT BATCH file.  (ex: 500-182)                                                                                 | Required          |
| TH03 - Transaction Type             | Identifies the purpose of initiating the transaction.  01 Send/Request Transaction  02 Acknowledgment (Used in Response only.)  03 Error Receiving (Used in Response only.)  04 Void (Used to void a specific Rx in a real-time transmission, or an entire batch file that has been transmitted.  When 04 is used the appropriate transaction control number in TH02 for the specific prescription or batch file must be included. When 04 is used only the TH Header Segment and the Transaction Trailer Segment are used.) | $$TH03^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends '01'                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Optional          |
| TH04 - Response ID                  | Contains the Transaction Control Number of a transaction that initiated the transaction. Required in response transaction only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$TH04^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| TH05 - Creation Date                | Date the file was created. Format: CCYYMMDD.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$TH05^PSOASAP()  | Kernel API - $$FMTHL7^XLFDT($$HTFM^XLFDT($H)  Example: 20240904                                                                                                                                                         | Required          |
| TH06 - Creation Time                | Time expressed in 24-hour clock time HHMMSS or HHMM). Time range: 000000 through 235959. The time zone should be reported in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) as HHMMSSZ (e.g., 235959Z). Do not include colons or non-numeric characters other than Z for Zulu time.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$TH06^PSOASAP()  | 1. Call Kernel API - $$HTFM^XLFDT($H)which returns back UTC date/time  Example: 091522  1. Take the TIME value of the returned date/time stamp and set that data to be exactly 6 in length and append a “Z" to the end. | Required          |
| TH07 - File Type                    | Code specifying the type of transaction.  P Production  T Test                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$THO7^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved via the Kernel API - $$PROD^XUPROD(1)                                                                                                                                                                         | Required          |
| TH08 - Routing Number/BIN           | This field can be used for real-time transmissions that go through an intermediary or network switch to indicate, if necessary, the specific state that the transactions should be routed to.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$TH08^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Optional          |
| TH09 - Segment Terminator Character | This terminates the TH segment and sets the actual value of the data segment terminator for the entire transaction.  The ASAP 5.0 Standard document uses the “~” in all examples. See the “Data Element Separators and Segment Terminators” in the standard's introduction for more information.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | $$TH09^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the SEGMENT TERMINATOR CHAR field (#58.4001,.03) of the SPMP ASAP RECORD DEFINITION file. Tilde character "~"                                                                                            | Required          |

Table 54: Information Source (IS) 5.0

| **Data Element**                           | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | **Requirement**   |
|--------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **IS –  Information Source Segment**       | **Purpose: To convey the name and identification number of the entity supplying the information.**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                   |
| IS01 - Unique Information Source ID        | Reference number or identification number as defined by the business partners. (Example: Phone number. However, if a phone number is used to populate this field, do not include hyphens.)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$IS01^PSOASAP()  | 1. Call REGISTRATION's $$SITE^VASITE to get the 3-digit VA SITE CODE  (e.g.,500) 2. Use the VA SITE CODE to find the first valid OUTPATIENT SITE entry at the SITE NUMBER (59,.06) x-ref. 3. If there isn't a match at the SITE NUMBER x-ref then populate IS01 with the VA SITE CODE retrieved at step 1 concatenated with the ZIP (4, 1.04) W/0 any hyphen and quit 4. Call $$NPI^XUSNPI passing in file 59 ien retrieved at the SITE NUMBER x-ref and the “"Organizational\_ID"" 5. If the NPI is not returned at step 4, then populate IS01 with the VA SITE CODE retrieved at step 1 concatenated with the ZIP (4, 1.04) W/0 any hyphen and quit 6. Return NPI that was returned at step 4 | Required          |
| IS02 - Information Source Entity Name      | Entity name of the Information Source.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | $$IS02^PSOASAP()  | OFFICIAL VA NAME field (#100) retrieved from the INSTITUTION file (#4)  Example: OKLAHOMA CITY VA MEDICAL CENTER                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Required          |
| IS03 - Message                             | Freetext message. Use of this field is defined by the PDMP. PDMPs may designate this field to hold the submission period date range of the file transmitted. When used to indicate the date range, it must be the first data text in the field and must be inserted using the following layout (where "#" and "-" are those literal characters): #CCYYMMDD#-#CCYYMMDD#  For example, a pharmacy may be submitting records for the reporting period of February 5, 2023 through February 11, 2023 but only filled reportable prescriptions on February 5 and February 7. The full submission period date range would be reported in IS03 as #20230205#-#20230211#. It is up to the PDMP to further define how to enter the submission date range for exceptional cases, such as for late submission records.  IS03 can also be used to show the date range for Zero Reports. | $$IS03^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |
| IS04 - Pharmacy Dispensing Software Vendor | Name of software vendor the pharmacy is using.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$IS04^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends DEPT OF VET AFFAIRS - OFFICE OF INFORMATION AND TECHNOLOGY                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
