| IS05 - Phone Number of Software Vendor     | No description provided in standard.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$IS05^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |

Table 55: Pharmacy Header (PHA) 5.0

| **Data Element**                                | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | **Data Source**   | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                          | **Requirement**   |
|-------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PHA –  Pharmacy Header Segment**              | **Purpose: To identify the pharmacy or the dispensing prescriber. It is required that information be provided in at least one of the following fields: PHA01, PHA02, or PH03. (Note: PHA04 through PHA13 can be used if needed by the state to further identify the sending entity.)**  **Level: Header**  **Requirement: Required** |                   |                                                                                                                                                                |                   |
| PHA01 - National Provider Identifier (NPI)      | Identifier assigned to the pharmacy by CMS. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$PHA01^PSOASAP() | NPI INSTITUTION field (#101) retrieved via the Kernel API $$NPI^XUSNPI (ICR# 4532) from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                             | Optional          |
| PHA02 - NCPDP Provider ID                       | Identifier assigned to pharmacy by the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$PHA02^PSOASAP() | NCPDP NUMBER field (#1008) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PHA03 - DEA Number                              | Identifier assigned to the pharmacy by the Drug Enforcement Administration. Used if required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$PHA03^PSOASAP() | FACILITY DEA NUMBER (#4,52) retrieved via the Kernel API $$WHAT^XUAF4 (ICR# 2171) using the RELATED INSTITUTION field (#100) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) | Optional          |
| PHA04 - Pharmacy or Dispensing Prescriber Name  | Freetext name of the pharmacy.  If a dispensing prescriber, the prescriber’s name and professional degree should be entered, such as John Doe MD.                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PHA04^PSOASAP() | NAME field (#.01) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                                    | Optional          |
| PHA05 - Address Information – 1                 | Freetext for address information.  Recommendation: Information should be reported according to United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specifications for Patient Addresses.                                                 | $$PHA05^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK STREET ADDRESS field (#.02) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                            | Optional          |
| PHA06 - Address Information - 2                 | Freetext for address additional information.  Recommendation: Information should be reported according to United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specifications for Patient Addresses.                                      | $$PHA06^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA07 - City Address                            | Freetext for city name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$PHA07^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK CITY field (#.07) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)                                                                                      | Optional          |
| PHA08 - State Address                           | Two-letter jurisdiction/state and possession abbreviation as described in United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specification for Patient Addresses.                                                                       | $$PHA08^PSOASAP() | ABBREVIATION field (#1) retrieved from the STATE file (#5) via pointer MAILING FRANK STATE field (#.08) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  Example: OK         | Optional          |
| PHA09 - ZIP Code Address                        | United States Postal Service ZIP Code or ZIP+4 as described in United States Postal Service Publication 28 Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specification for Patient Addresses. Do not include white spaces or special characters. Include hyphens in ZIP+4.     | $$PHA09^PSOASAP() | MAILING FRANK ZIP+4 CODE field (#.05) retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  hyphen included  Example: 73104-5028                                          | Optional          |
| PHA10 - Phone Number                            | Complete phone number including area code. Exclude hyphens.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$PHA10^PSOASAP() | AREA CODE (#.03) and PHONE NUMBER (#.04) fields retrieved from OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59)  hyphens excluded  Example: 4056948387                               | Optional          |
| PHA11 - Contact Name                            | Freetext name of vendor contact.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | $$PHA11^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA12 - Chain Site ID                           | Store number assigned by the chain to the pharmacy location. Used when PDMP needs to identify the specific pharmacy from which information is required.                                                                                                                                                                              | $$PHA12^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA13 - Pharmacy's Permit Number/License Number | Used to help identify the sending pharmacy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $$PHA13^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PHA14 - Pharmacy/Dispenser Type                 | 01 Independent Pharmacy  02 Chain Pharmacy  03 Long-term Care Pharmacy  04 Hospital Pharmacy  05 Opioid Treatment Program  06 Cannabis Dispensary  07 Veterinary/ Vet Patient Only Dispenser  08 Dispensing Prescriber  09 Specialty Pharmacy  10 Federal  11 Tribal  99 Other                                                       | $$PHA14^PSOASAP() | VistA sends '10'                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PHA15 - Mail Order Pharmacy                     | 01 Yes  02 No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$PHA15^PSOASAP() | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |

Table 56: Patient Information (PAT) 5.0

| **Data Element**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | **Name Description**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | **Data Source**    | **Data Source Notes**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | **Requirement**   |
|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| **PAT – Patient Information Segment**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | **Purpose: Used to report the patient’s name and basic information as contained in the pharmacy record.**  **Level: Detail**  **Requirement: Required**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                   |
| PAT01 - ID Qualifier of Patient Identifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Code identifying the jurisdiction that issues the ID in PAT03.  Used if the PDMP requires such identification.  If PAT01 is populated, then PAT02 and PAT03 must be populated as well.  ASAP version 5.0 Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | $$PAT01^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends 'US'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PAT02 - ID Qualifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Code to identify the type of ID in PAT03.  If PAT02 is used, PAT03 is required.  01 Military ID  02 State Issued ID  03 Unique System ID  04 Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)  05 Passport ID  06 Driver’s License ID  07 Social Security Number  08 Tribal ID  09 Vendor Specific (such as Bamboo Health, Experian, LexisNexis)  10 Veterinary Patient Microchip Number  11 Medicaid Recipient ID Number  99 Other (Trading partner agreed upon ID, such as cardholder ID)                                               | $$PAT02^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends '07'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PAT03 - ID of Patient                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Identification number for the patient as indicated in PAT02.  An example would be the driver’s license number.  This field can only be populated with code 10 when provided on the prescription.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | $$PAT03^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER field (#2,.09) of the PATIENT file via the REGISTRATION DEM^VADPT API  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PAT04 - ID Qualifier of Additional Patient Identifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Code identifying the jurisdiction that issues the ID in PAT06. Used if the PDMP requires such identification.  ASAP version 5.0 Standard Appendix A lists jurisdictions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | $$PAT04^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| PAT05 - Additional Patient ID Qualifier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | 01 Military ID  02 State Issued ID  03 Unique System ID  04 Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)  05 Passport ID  06 Driver's License ID  07 Social Security Number  08 Tribal ID  09 Vendor Specific (such as Bamboo Health, Experian, LexisNexis)  10 Veterinary Patient Microchip Number  11 Medicaid Recipient ID Number  99 Other (Trading partner agreed upon ID, such as cardholder ID.)                                                                                                                               | $$PAT05^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| PAT06 - Additional ID                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Identification that might be required by the PDMP to further identify the individual. An example might be in that PAT03 driver’s license is required and in PAT06 Social Security number is also required.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | $$PAT06^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Optional          |
| PAT07 - Last Name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Patient’s last name.  Recommended way to report:  Report the patient’s complete legal last name ONLY as listed on a government-issued identification  Do NOT report extraneous information or notes in this field  Do NOT enter Prefix or Suffix in Last Name field  Do NOT report special characters (e.g., parentheses, asterisk) other than a hyphen or apostrophe.  If for a veterinary patient, enter information of PERSON responsible for the care of the animal or who arranges for the animal’s veterinary care      | $$PAT07^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the following logic:  1. If the patient DFN exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20), PAT07 is assigned the value at the FAMILY (LAST) NAME field (#1) in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20). 2. If no entry exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20) for the patient DFN, PAT07 is assigned the value before the first comma of the NAME field (#.01) in the PATIENT file (#2).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, DEM^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Required          |
| PAT08 - First Name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Patient’s first name.  Recommended way to report:  Report the patient’s complete legal first name ONLY as listed on a government-issued identification  Do NOT report extraneous information or notes in this field  Do NOT enter Prefix or Suffix in First Name field  Do NOT report special characters (e.g., parentheses, asterisk) other than a hyphen or apostrophe.  If for a veterinary patient, enter information of PERSON responsible for the care of the animal or who arranges for the animal’s veterinary care   | $$PAT08^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the following logic:  1. If the patient DFN exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20), PAT08 is assigned the value at the GIVEN (FIRST) NAME field (#2) in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20). 2. If no entry exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20) for the patient DFN, PAT08 is assigned the value before the first space and after the first comma of the NAME field (#.01) in the PATIENT file (#2).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, DEM^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Required          |
| PAT09 - Middle Name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Patient's middle name or initial if available. Used if available in pharmacy system and required by the PDMP.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | $$PAT09^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the following logic:  1. If the patient DFN exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20), PAT09 is assigned to the value at the MIDDLE NAME field (#3) in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20). 2. If no entry exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20) for the patient DFN, PAT09 is assigned the value after the first comma and after the first space of the NAME field (#.01) in the PATIENT file (#2).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, DEM^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Optional          |
| PAT10 - Name Prefix                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Patient’s name prefix such as Mr. or Dr. Used if available in pharmacy system and required by the PDMP. Do not report special characters other than a hyphen or a period.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | $$PAT10^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the following logic:  1. If the patient DFN exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20), the PREFIX field (#4) in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20). 2. If no entry exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20) for the patient DFN, VistA sends “” (null).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, DEM^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PAT11 - Name Suffix                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Patient’s name suffix such as Jr. or the III.  Used if available in pharmacy system and if required by the PDMP.  Do not report special characters other than a hyphen or a period.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$PAT11^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the following logic:  1. If the patient DFN exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20), the SUFFIX field (#5) in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20). 2. If no entry exists in the NAME COMPONENTS file (#20) for the patient DFN, VistA sends “” (null).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, ADD^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Optional          |
| PAT12 - Address Information – 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | If the pharmacy management system stores 35 bytes or less for the address, no programming change is necessary. If the address stored in the system is a P.O. box number, defer to the specifications of the PDMP as to whether this should be  reported in PAT12 or PAT13.  Recommendation: Information should be reported according to United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specifications for Patient Addresses. | $$PAT12^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the STREET ADDRESS [LINE 1] field (#.111) in the PATIENT file (#2).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, ADD^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Required          |
| PAT13 - Address Information – 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Freetext for additional address information, if required by the PDMP and is available in pharmacy system. Recommendation: Information should be reported according to United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specifications for Patient Addresses.                                                                                                                                                                   | $$PAT13^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the STREET ADDRESS [LINE 2] field (#.112) in the PATIENT file (#2)  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, ADD^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Optional          |
| PAT14 - City Address                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Freetext for city name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | $$PAT14^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the CITY field (#.114) in the PATIENT file (#2).  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, ADD^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Required          |
| PAT15 - Jurisdiction/State Address                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Jurisdiction / state and possession abbreviation as described in United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specification for Patient Addresses.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | $$PAT15^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the following logic:  If the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) is the United States, retrieved from the ABBREVATION field (#1) in the STATE file (#5) pointed to by the STATE field (#.115) in the PATIENT file (#2).  If the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) is not the United States, retrieved from the PROVINCE field (#.1171) in the PATIENT file (#2).  API ADD^VADPT is called and it is a supported reference to the REGISTRATION API. (ICR# 10061).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Required          |
| PAT16 - ZIP Code Address                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | United States Postal Service ZIP Code or ZIP+4 as described in United States Postal Service Publication 28-Postal Addressing Standards or the most recently published version of the ONC Project US@ Technical Specification for Patient Addresses.  Do not include white spaces or special characters.  Include hyphens in ZIP+4. Postal code will be reported for non-U.S. addresses.                                                                                                                                       | $$PAT16^PSOASAP()  | API ADD^VADPT is called and it is a supported reference to the REGISTRATION API.  (ICR# 10061).  Retrieved using the following logic:  If the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) is the United States, retrieved from the ZIP CODE field (#.116) in the PATIENT file (#2).  If the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) is not the United States, retrieved from the POSTAL CODE (#.1172) in the PATIENT file (#2).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Required          |
| PAT17 - Phone Number                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Complete phone number including area code when a state PDMP requires and is available in the pharmacy system.  Exclude hyphens.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | $$PAT17^PSOASAP()  | API ADD^VADPT is called and it is a supported reference to the REGISTRATION API.  (ICR# 10061).  Retrieved using the following logic:  Use PHONE NUMBER [RESIDENCE] field (#.131) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use PHONE NUMBER [CELLULAR] field (#.134) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else PHONE NUMBER [WORK] field (#.132) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use K-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.21011) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use K2-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.2199) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use E-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.33011) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use E2-WORK PHONE NUMBER field (#.331011) in the PATIENT file (#2) if not null  Else use AREA CODE field (#.03) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) concatenated to the PHONE NUMBER field (#.04) in the OUTPATIENT SITE file (#59) | Optional          |
| PAT18 - Date of Birth                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Owner’s date of birth as listed on a government-issued identification. If for a veterinary patient Date of Birth should be listed as directed by applicable state/jurisdiction PDMP laws and regulations. Format: CCYYMMDD.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$PAT18^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved from the DATE OF BIRTH field (#.03) in the PATIENT file (#2)  Retrieved using the REGISTRATION API, DEM^VADPT  ICR #10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Required          |
| PAT19 - Gender Code                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Codes indicating the sex of the patient if required by the PDMP.  F Female  M Male  N Non-Binary  U Unknown / Undisclosed  X Unspecified/Other                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | $$PAT19^PSOASAP()  | Retrieved using the Registration API $$DEM^VADPT (ICR #10061) and return variable VADM(5).  If no value is found, VistA sends 'U'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Optional          |
| PAT20 - Species Code                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Used if required by the PDMP to differentiate a prescription for an individual from one prescribed for an animal.  01 Human  02 Veterinary Patient                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | $$PAT20^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends '01'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PAT21 - Patient Location Code                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Code indicating where patient is located when receiving services, if required by PDMP.  01 Home  02 Intermediary Care  03 Nursing Home  04 Long-Term/Extended Care  05 Rest Home  06 Boarding Home  07 Skilled-Care Facility  08 Sub-Acute Care Facility  09 Acute-Care Facility  10 Outpatient  11 Hospice  12 Homeless/Unhoused  13 Transient Care  98 Unknown  99 Other                                                                                                                                                    | $$PAT21^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends '10'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Optional          |
| PAT22 - Country of Non-U.S. Resident                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Used when the patient’s address is a foreign country. This is a freetext field. ASAP does not provide a list of countries for this field. PDMPs may permit some of the other address fields to not be used if this field is populated.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | $$PAT22^PSOASAP()  | API ADD^VADPT is called and it is a supported reference to the REGISTRATION API.  (ICR# 10061).  Retrieved If COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2) points to the US in the COUNTRY CODE file (#779.004), VistA returns “” (null).  Else VistA returns the FIPS CODE field (#1.2) in the COUNTRY CODE file (#779.004) pointed to by the COUNTRY field (#.1173) in the PATIENT file (#2).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Optional          |
| PAT23 - Name of Animal                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Used if required by the PDMP for prescriptions written by a veterinarian. An unnamed animal could be described as COWSmith or as COW1Smith.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | $$PAT23^PSOASAP()  | VistA sends "" (null)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Not Used          |
| PAT24 - Patient Preferred or Alias Last Name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | May be used for a preferred name, previous name, nickname, alias, or name used on insurance card if different than legal last name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$PAT24^PSOASAP1() | If available, returns the value in the first piece by "," from the ALIAS field (#.01) of the PATIENT file (#2).  ICR# 5708                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Optional          |
| PAT25 - Patient Preferred or Alias First Name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Maybe used for a preferred name, previous name, nickname, alias, or name used on insurance card if different than legal first name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | $$PAT25^PSOASAP1() | If available, returns the value in the second piece by "," from the ALIAS field (#.01) of the PATIENT file (#2).  ICR# 5708                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Optional          |
| PAT26 - Patient Race Category                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Code used for general race category.  01 American Indian or Alaskan Native  02 Asian  03 Black or African American  04 Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander  05 White  06 Multiracial  99 Other/Unknown                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | $$PAT26^PSOASAP1() | Retrieved using the supported call to DEM^VADPT API including the array element for the RACE related field VADM(12). The RACE INFORMATION (#2.02,.01) is evaluated and the proper RACE category is applied.  For multi-racial, if the PATIENT has more than one race then apply code 06.  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Optional          |
| PAT27 - Patient Ethnicity                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Code used to describe general ethnicity group of the patient.  01 Hispanic or Latino  02 Not Hispanic or Latino  99 Undisclosed/Unknown                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | $$PAT27^PSOASAP1() | Retrieval of the ETHINICITY data from the DEM^VADPT call including the array element for ETHNICITY related field VADM(11).  ICR# 10061                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Optional          |
| PAT28 - Veterinary Species Code
